name: Smartcat
description: Smartcat is a translation management platform that combines human translators, AI translation, and translation memories. Use this API to create translation projects, upload documents for translation, track progress, download completed translations, and manage translation memories.

capabilities.name: create_project
capabilities.description: Create a new translation project with specified source and target languages, workflow, and settings.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: List all translation projects in the account with optional filtering by status and date.

capabilities.name: upload_document
capabilities.description: Upload a document file to an existing project for translation.

capabilities.name: get_document_status
capabilities.description: Check the translation progress and status of a specific document within a project.

capabilities.name: download_translation
capabilities.description: Download the translated version of a completed document.

capabilities.name: list_translation_memories
capabilities.description: List all translation memories (TMs) available in the account for reuse across projects.
